note: Trace events were declared by the effective adapter generated from source test evidence.

operation_metadata.description: Parse JSON strings and verify type predicates.
operation_metadata.normalization: Map cJSON type tests to target JsonValue type methods.

input.case: Parse '{"a": true}' and check it is an object, not array, not null, not number, not string, not boolean.

expected.observable_behavior: Parsed value is_object() == true, is_array() == false, is_null() == false, is_number() == false, is_string() == false, is_boolean() == false.

operation_metadata.description: Parse JSON strings and verify type predicates.
operation_metadata.normalization: Map cJSON type tests to target JsonValue type methods.

input.case: Parse an invalid JSON string 'not json' and expect error.

operation_metadata.description: Parse with options (null input, empty string, incomplete, require null).
operation_metadata.normalization: cJSON_ParseWithOpts with require_null_terminated maps to parse (which requires full valid JSON). NULL input and empty strings should produce error. Target parse returns Result, so we check Err for invalid input.

input.case: Parse empty string and expect error.

operation_metadata.description: Parse with options (null input, empty string, incomplete, require null).
operation_metadata.normalization: cJSON_ParseWithOpts with require_null_terminated maps to parse (which requires full valid JSON). NULL input and empty strings should produce error. Target parse returns Result, so we check Err for invalid input.

input.case: Parse incomplete JSON '{ "name": ' and expect error.

operation_metadata.description: Parse with options (null input, empty string, incomplete, require null).
operation_metadata.normalization: cJSON_ParseWithOpts with require_null_terminated maps to parse (which requires full valid JSON). NULL input and empty strings should produce error. Target parse returns Result, so we check Err for invalid input.

input.case: Parse "{}x" with require_null_terminated (equivalent to parse) and expect error because trailing chars.

operation_metadata.description: Parse JSON and retrieve string and number values.
operation_metadata.normalization: cJSON_GetStringValue returns char*; target as_str returns Option<&str>. cJSON_GetNumberValue returns double; target as_f64 returns Option<f64>. cJSON_GetObjectItemCaseSensitive returns cJSON*; target Object::get returns Option<&JsonValue>. cJSON_HasObjectItem returns bool; target has_key returns bool.

input.case: Parse '"test"' and call as_str, expect Some("test").

operation_metadata.description: Parse JSON and retrieve string and number values.
operation_metadata.normalization: cJSON_GetStringValue returns char*; target as_str returns Option<&str>. cJSON_GetNumberValue returns double; target as_f64 returns Option<f64>. cJSON_GetObjectItemCaseSensitive returns cJSON*; target Object::get returns Option<&JsonValue>. cJSON_HasObjectItem returns bool; target has_key returns bool.

input.case: Parse '1' and call as_f64, expect Some(1.0).

operation_metadata.description: Parse JSON and retrieve string and number values.
operation_metadata.normalization: cJSON_GetStringValue returns char*; target as_str returns Option<&str>. cJSON_GetNumberValue returns double; target as_f64 returns Option<f64>. cJSON_GetObjectItemCaseSensitive returns cJSON*; target Object::get returns Option<&JsonValue>. cJSON_HasObjectItem returns bool; target has_key returns bool.

input.case: Parse '{"one":1, "Two":2, "tHree":3}' and retrieve items case-sensitive.

expected.observable_behavior: object["one"].as_f64() == Some(1.0); object["Two"].as_f64() == Some(2.0); object["tHree"].as_f64() == Some(3.0); object["One"].is_null() == true

operation_metadata.description: Parse JSON and retrieve string and number values.
operation_metadata.normalization: cJSON_GetStringValue returns char*; target as_str returns Option<&str>. cJSON_GetNumberValue returns double; target as_f64 returns Option<f64>. cJSON_GetObjectItemCaseSensitive returns cJSON*; target Object::get returns Option<&JsonValue>. cJSON_HasObjectItem returns bool; target has_key returns bool.

input.case: Check has_key for existing and missing keys.

operation_metadata.description: Create an object and add items using helper functions.
operation_metadata.normalization: cJSON_Add*ToObject create and attach items; target uses Object::insert or JsonValue::insert (which internally uses Object::insert). For reference-style adds (cJSON_AddItemToObjectCS), target insert replaces existing key. Boolean and null helpers map to inserting a JsonValue::Boolean or JsonValue::Null.

input.case: Create object, insert true and false as boolean values.

operation_metadata.description: Create an object and add items using helper functions.
operation_metadata.normalization: cJSON_Add*ToObject create and attach items; target uses Object::insert or JsonValue::insert (which internally uses Object::insert). For reference-style adds (cJSON_AddItemToObjectCS), target insert replaces existing key. Boolean and null helpers map to inserting a JsonValue::Boolean or JsonValue::Null.

input.case: Create object, insert number 42.

operation_metadata.normalization: cJSON_Add*ToObject create and attach items; target uses Object::insert or JsonValue::insert (which internally uses Object::insert). For reference-style adds (cJSON_AddItemToObjectCS), target insert replaces existing key. Boolean and null helpers map to inserting a JsonValue::Boolean or JsonValue::Null.

input.case: Create object, insert string "Hello World!".

For reference-style adds (cJSON_AddItemToObjectCS), target insert replaces existing key. Boolean and null helpers map to inserting a JsonValue::Boolean or JsonValue::Null.

operation_metadata.description: Create an object and add items using helper functions.
operation_metadata.normalization: cJSON_Add*ToObject create and attach items; target uses Object::insert or JsonValue::insert (which internally uses Object::insert). For reference-style adds (cJSON_AddItemToObjectCS), target insert replaces existing key. Boolean and null helpers map to inserting a JsonValue::Boolean or JsonValue::Null.

input.case: Create object, add number via AddItemToObjectCS (reference) – target insert overwrites same key.

operation_metadata.description: Create arrays, add items, get size, remove items.
operation_metadata.normalization: cJSON_AddItemToArray transfers ownership; target push moves value. cJSON_GetArraySize returns int; target len returns usize. Both delete/detach map to array_remove (detach returns removed, delete discards). PrintUnformatted maps to dump.

input.case: Create array, push three null values (converted from JsonValue::Null).

operation_metadata.description: Create arrays, add items, get size, remove items.
operation_metadata.normalization: cJSON_AddItemToArray transfers ownership; target push moves value. cJSON_GetArraySize returns int; target len returns usize. Both delete/detach map to array_remove (detach returns removed, delete discards). PrintUnformatted maps to dump.

input.case: Get length of array after pushes.

operation_metadata.description: Create arrays, add items, get size, remove items.
operation_metadata.normalization: cJSON_AddItemToArray transfers ownership; target push moves value. cJSON_GetArraySize returns int; target len returns usize. Both delete/detach map to array_remove (detach returns removed, delete discards). PrintUnformatted maps to dump.

input.case: Create array with two items, remove first item (index 0), dump result.

operation_metadata.description: Create arrays, add items, get size, remove items.
operation_metadata.normalization: cJSON_AddItemToArray transfers ownership; target push moves value. cJSON_GetArraySize returns int; target len returns usize. Both delete/detach map to array_remove (detach returns removed, delete discards). PrintUnformatted maps to dump.

input.case: Detach item from array (array_remove returns removed).

expected.observable_behavior: after detach, removed value is the item; array length decreases.

operation_metadata.description: Print JSON without formatting (compact).
operation_metadata.normalization: cJSON_PrintUnformatted returns compact string; target dump returns compact string.

input.case: Build a simple JSON object and dump it.

expected.observable_behavior: dump() returns a compact JSON string without whitespace.

operation_metadata.description: Pretty-print JSON objects.
operation_metadata.normalization: cJSON_Print returns formatted string; target pretty returns String with given spaces.

input.case: Parse a simple object and pretty-print with 4 spaces.

expected.observable_behavior: pretty(4) returns a formatted string with newlines and indentation.

operation_metadata.description: Replace an item in an object preserving the key.
operation_metadata.normalization: cJSON_ReplaceItemInObject replaces value at key; target Object::insert overwrites. Both preserve key string.

input.case: Create object with child number 1, replace it with number 2, key preserved.

operation_metadata.description: Remove items from objects by key.
operation_metadata.normalization: Both delete and detach remove the key; delete discards, detach returns removed. Target Object::remove returns Option<JsonValue>; JsonValue::remove returns JsonValue (Null if missing).

input.case: Create object with key, remove it, verify key no longer exists.

expected.observable_behavior: object.has_key("key") == false; removed value is correct.
